ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or synopsis of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of genres the movie belongs to */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Production budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the movie */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the movie record for auditing purposes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie associated with the cast member */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie associated with the crew member */,
  "crew_role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., Director, Producer) */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member (e.g., direction, production, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie associated with the keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword related to the movie */,
  "keyword_type" TEXT /* Type of the keyword (e.g., genre, theme, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie associated with the performance data */,
  "gross_revenue" REAL /* Total gross revenue of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend" REAL /* Revenue for the opening weekend of the movie */,
  "opening_weekend_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening weekend */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie associated with the rating */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Average rating score of the movie */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received by the movie */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie associated with the review */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current production status of the movie (e.g., Pre-Production, Released) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the production status was updated */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Notes related to the production status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_status_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, producer, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
